NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-21-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 501. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-08-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-07-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DEFENDANT BEN WONG'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT PRESENTS AN INSUFFICIENT EXPLANATION FOR THE DELAY IN BRINGING THIS MOTION AND DOES NOT ADDRESS WHY HE LEARNED ABOUT THE NON PAYMENT OF RENT THIS LATE IN THE PROCESS. DEFENDANT, AS THE LANDLORD, WAS PRESUMABLY IN POSSESSION OF FACTS REGARDING NONPAYMENT FOR OVER A YEAR. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. Appearance for Defendant. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar

Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT BEN WONG'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Defendant presents an insufficient explanation for the delay in bringing this motion and does not address why he learned about the non payment of rent this late in the process. Defendant, as the landlord, was presumably in possession of facts regarding nonpayment for over a year. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BEN WONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Michael G. Bolgatz, Esq. Attorney at Law, (510) 684-6384 appearing for Defendant and Moving party; Andrew Catterall, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 309-5588 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
